subcodes.title: Words to Mrs Moody's relatives, spoken on 1912-11-02
subcodes.first_line: Behold how the power of Baha'u'llah has connected the hearts and has joined the East and the West. When Dr Moody first went to Tihran
subcodes.first_line_orig: به بینید قدرت حضرت بهآءالله چگونه قلوب را ارتباط داده و شرق و غرب را بهم مربوط ساخته که وقتی دکتور مودی بطهران رفت
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @unity; oneness of humanity
